currentClaim: v0.3.0 release-readiness review passed locally; the worktree is ready for curated commit / PR boundary review, but v0.3.0 has not been published or tagged.

doneWhenChecklist.label: README, usage guide, release notes, and checklist clearly separate stable v0.2.0 from internal v0.3.0 RC work
Committed truth and runtime smoke artifacts remain separated
Publish, tag, repository visibility, and GitHub Release actions remain gated behind explicit user approval

knownGaps: GitHub CI has not been re-run in this turn; local verification is green.
The worktree is intentionally broad and should be curated carefully before commit / PR.
v0.3.0 still does not promise multi-provider automation or real external skill invocation.
